heading: Members: physical examinations
label: 10206 Members: physical examinations
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 1004(a), (b) of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(4)(A)

children.text: have a comprehensive medical readiness health and dental assessment on an annual basis, including routine annual preventive health care screening and periodic comprehensive physical examinations in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense that reflect morbidity and mortality risks associated with the military service, age, and gender of the member; and
execute and submit to the Secretary concerned on an annual basis documentation of the medical and dental readiness of the member to perform military duties.
attendance at a school of the armed forces; or
other action related to career progression.

children.label: c
children.text: Each Reserve in an active status, or on an inactive status list, who is not on active duty shall execute and submit annually to the Secretary concerned a certificate of physical condition.

children.label: d
children.text: The kind of duty to which a Reserve ordered to active duty may be assigned shall be considered in determining physical qualifications for active duty.
